candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; forms bulk of top-line and is a direct candidate.
Includes Revenue plus Other Revenues; best single representation of total top-line while allowing priority logic to fall back to 'Revenue' if needed.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenue' and 'Other Revenues' exist; 'Total revenues' aggregates them and is prioritized, with 'Revenue' as fallback per REVT priority rule.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production costs / cost of sales in an E&P context; clearly linked to production activities.
Exploration-related but not strictly ongoing production COGS; less direct than 'Production expenses'.

variables.notes: 'Production expenses' most directly represents cost of goods sold; other listed items are overhead, financial, or non-production costs.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line item (though currently with missing values); per hierarchy it should be included and supplemented with overhead buckets.
Personnel-related overhead; typical SG&A component excluding production COGS and D&A.
Explicit stock-based compensation within SG&A; clearly an SG&A component.
General operating overhead not classified as COGS or D&A; fits SG&A bucket.
Additional operating overhead bucket; complements 'Other operating expenses'.
Additional share-based compensation line that functions as SG&A-type overhead.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A line exists but appears mostly empty in the preview; per rules it is included along with major overhead components (personnel, stock-based comp, other operating expenses). Totals and balancing items are excluded.

candidates.why: Represents capitalized R&D asset, not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset to capitalized R&D; again not the period expense line in the income statement.

variables.notes: Only capitalized R&D balance sheet items are present; there is no clear income statement R&D expense line, so XRD is treated as missing (0).

candidates.why: Specific recurring interest expense on bond debt; primary component of interest expense.
Interest expense on bank loans; another core interest expense component.
Interest on other current interest-bearing liabilities; part of finance costs.
Generic interest expense line; present though currently without values in preview; used as additional label in priority chain.
Interest on convertible debt; may be relevant in some periods even if preview shows nans.
Interest related to exploration loan; another possible interest expense label over time.
Unwinding of discount on abandonment provisions; economically interest, though somewhat different in nature.
Capitalized interest; included last in priority as it is not a P&L expense but part of interest-related flows.

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels exist; ordered so that core bond and bank loan interest are used first, with other forms of interest and capitalized interest as fallbacks per the XINT priority rule.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders' equity; there is no more specific 'Equity attributable to owners/parent' line to exclude non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owner equity vs. non-controlling interests lines are present; therefore 'Total Equity' is used for BE and MIB is set to 0 to avoid double counting.
No line items for minority interest or non-controlling interests appear on the balance sheet; MIB is treated as 0.
